auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Asana personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Get it from the Asana developer console at https://app.asana.com/0/my-apps.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create an Asana project in a workspace with optional notes, owner, dates, and display settings.

owner.description: The project owner identifier, such as "me", an email, or a user gid.

dueOn.description: The project due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startOn.description: The project start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

defaultAccessLevel.description: The Asana project default access level.

customFields.description: Arbitrary object keyed by Asana custom field gid.

workspaceId.description: The Asana workspace gid that owns the project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_task
actions.description: Create a new Asana task in a project with optional assignee, notes, dates, and custom fields.

assignee.description: The Asana task assignee, such as "me", an email, or a user gid.

dueOn.description: The task due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dueAt.description: The task due date-time in RFC 3339 format.

startOn.description: The task start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startAt.description: The task start date-time in RFC 3339 format.

customFields.description: Arbitrary object keyed by Asana custom field gid.

projectId.description: The Asana project gid that should receive the task.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get a single Asana project by gid.

includeFields.description: Additional Asana fields to request via opt_fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Get a single Asana task by gid.

includeFields.description: Additional Asana fields to request via opt_fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_workspace
actions.description: Get a single Asana workspace by gid.

includeFields.description: Additional Asana fields to request via opt_fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

is_organization.description: Whether the workspace is an organization.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_project_tasks
actions.description: List tasks within an Asana project, ordered by project priority, with pagination support.

completedSince.description: Only include tasks incomplete or completed since this RFC 3339 timestamp, or use the literal "now".

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return in one Asana page.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Asana response.

includeFields.description: Additional Asana fields to request via opt_fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: Opaque pagination cursor for the next Asana page, or null when there is no next page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List Asana projects for a workspace, with optional archived filtering and pagination.

workspaceId.description: The Asana workspace gid to filter projects on.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return in one Asana page.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Asana response.

includeFields.description: Additional Asana fields to request via opt_fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: Opaque pagination cursor for the next Asana page, or null when there is no next page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_workspaces
actions.description: List the Asana workspaces visible to the connected personal access token.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return in one Asana page.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Asana response.

includeFields.description: Additional Asana fields to request via opt_fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

is_organization.description: Whether the workspace is an organization.

anyOf.description: Opaque pagination cursor for the next Asana page, or null when there is no next page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: update_project
actions.description: Update an existing Asana project by gid.

owner.description: The project owner identifier, such as "me", an email, or a user gid.

dueOn.description: The project due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startOn.description: The project start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

defaultAccessLevel.description: The Asana project default access level.

customFields.description: Arbitrary object keyed by Asana custom field gid.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: update_task
actions.description: Update an existing Asana task by gid.

assignee.description: The Asana task assignee, such as "me", an email, or a user gid.

dueOn.description: The task due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dueAt.description: The task due date-time in RFC 3339 format.

startOn.description: The task start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startAt.description: The task start date-time in RFC 3339 format.

customFields.description: Arbitrary object keyed by Asana custom field gid.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.
